narrative:
Mayfield Village-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 689 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
